# SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
#
# Wells Fargo Advisors SNAPSHOT — self-directed brokerage holding only swept
# cash. Modelled on a June 2025 production statement.
#
# HAND-WRITTEN, NOT EXTRACTED. Every identifying field is replaced; only the
# LABELS and the DOLLAR FIGURES are verbatim, because those are what the parser
# matches on and what its assertions mean. A file produced by running pypdf
# over a real statement carries the account holder's home address, personal
# email, the advisor's name and direct line, the account number, and every
# transaction with merchant and card last-4 — in a form that greps and indexes
# more cleanly than the PDF does. It must never be committed; see .gitignore.
#
# Redactions applied:
#   mailing address     -> REDACTED MAILING ADDRESS
#   email               -> user@example.com
#   advisor name/phone  -> TEST ADVISOR / 555-000-0000
#   account number      -> 0000-0000
#   merchants / card    -> MERCHANT A / MERCHANT B, no card digits
#
# Lines beginning '#' are stripped by the loader; everything else is fed to the
# parser as one line of extracted PDF text. Blank lines are preserved as page
# breaks in spirit only — the parser reads the whole document.

SNAPSHOT
Current period ending June 30, 2025
ACCOUNT NAME: ORCHARD EXAMPLE LLC
ACCOUNT NUMBER: 0000-0000
REDACTED MAILING ADDRESS
user@example.com
Your Financial Advisor:
TEST ADVISOR Phone: 555-000-0000
Wells Fargo Advisors is a trade name used by Wells Fargo Clearing Services, LLC

# --- physical page 5 = statement page 1 of 9 -------------------------------
Page 1 of 9SNAPSHOT
ORCHARD EXAMPLE LLC
Progress summary Value over time
THIS PERIOD THIS YEAR
Opening value $9,467.48 $0.00
Cash deposited 0.00 42,354.80 12,000Securities deposited 0.00 0.00
Cash withdrawn -1,674.31 -34,561.29
Securities withdrawn 0.00 0.00 6,000Change in value 0.34 1.60
Closing value $7,793.51 $7,793.51 4,000
Portfolio summary
CURRENT ASSET TYPE VALUE ON MAY 31 % VALUE ON JUN 30 % ANN. INCOME
ASSETS Cash and sweep balances 9,467.48 100.00 7,793.51 100.00 4
Fixed income securities 0.00 0.00 0.00 0.00 0
Asset value $9,467.48 100% $7,793.51 100% $4

# --- physical page 6 = statement page 2 of 9 -------------------------------
Page 2 of 9SNAPSHOT
ORCHARD EXAMPLE LLC
Cash flow summary THIS PERIOD THIS YEAR
Opening value of cash and sweep balances $9,467.48
Income and distributions 0.34 1.60
Other additions 0.00 37,786.80
Net additions to cash $0.34 $37,788.40
Withdrawals by check 0.00 -4,568.00
ATM and CheckCard activity -1,674.31 -6,381.93
Other subtractions, transfers & charges 0.00 -19,044.96
Net subtractions from cash -$1,674.31 -$29,994.89
Closing value of cash and sweep balances $7,793.51
Income summary * THIS PERIOD THIS YEAR
TAXABLE Money market/sweep funds 0.34 1.60
Total taxable income $0.34 $1.60
Total federally tax-exempt income $0.00 $0.00
Total income $0.34 $1.60
* Certain distributions made in the current year are reported as prior year income according to IRS regulations. This may cause a difference between Cash Flow and Income
Summary totals.
Gain/loss summary ** UNREALIZED THIS PERIOD REALIZED THIS YEAR REALIZED
Short term/Net lots 0.00 0.00 0.00
Long term (L) 0.00 0.00 0.00
Total $0.00 $0.00 $0.00
** Net tax lots can combine short and long term holdings into the Short term/Net lots category.

# --- physical page 7 = statement page 3 of 9 -------------------------------
Page 3 of 9SNAPSHOT
ORCHARD EXAMPLE LLC
Account type: Brokerage Cash Services Brokerage account number: 0000-0000
Brokerage Cash Services number: 1234567890 Go paperless.
Money market and sweep funds 7,793.51 Statements: X
Your total available funds $7,793.51
June 1, 2025 - June 30, 2025

# --- physical page 8 = statement page 4 of 9 -------------------------------
Page 4 of 9
Cash and Sweep Balances
DESCRIPTION ACCOUNT YIELD EARNED* MARKET VALUE ANNUAL INCOME
Total Cash and Sweep Balances 100.00 $7,793.51 $4.00
Total Bank Deposits $7,793.51

# --- physical page 9 = statement page 5 of 9 -------------------------------
# Individual transaction detail. Merchants generalised; the parser reads none
# of this, but the section has to be present because its subtotal rows are the
# ones a naive recognizer mistakes for the statement's own figures.
Page 5 of 9
ATM and CheckCard activity
VISA CHECK CARD MERCHANT A06/01 Cash -72.17
VISA CHECK CARD MERCHANT B06/02 Cash -52.98
Total ATM and CheckCard activity: -$1,674.31

# --- physical page 12 = statement page 8 of 9 ------------------------------
# THE TRAP. pypdf flattens this two-column table so that 'ENDING BALANCE' is
# immediately followed by a single sweep transfer's amount. The v0.4.40
# recognizer read -10.78 as this month's closing balance; it is 7,793.51.
Page 8 of 9
Cash sweep activity
DATE TRANSACTION DESCRIPTION AMOUNT BANK BALANCE
BEGINNING BALANCE TRANSFER FROM BANK DEPOSIT SWEEP06/01 9,467.48 06/09 -10.78
TRANSFER FROM BANK DEPOSIT SWEEP ENDING BALANCE06/05 -10.78 06/30 7,793.51
06/01 BEGINNING BALANCE $0.00
06/30 ENDING BALANCE $0.00
